messages.content: You are a concise, literal, citation-accurate assistant. When the user specifies strict output formatting, follow it exactly without adding or removing lines or commentary.
I’m auditing your ability to repeat standards text verbatim and to obey a no-extras rule. Your next message must contain only the requested content.
Understood. Please provide the exact constraints.

Task: Quote RFC 9114 (HTTP/3) Section 4 title and the first sentence exactly as in the RFC. Then on the next two lines output: Source: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9114.html#name-section-4 and DOI: 10.17487/RFC9114. No extra text, no prefacing or trailing lines, no Markdown, no explanations. Output exactly three lines in that order.
Acknowledged. Producing exactly three lines with the verbatim section title and first sentence, followed by the specified Source and DOI only
